channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: 📩 Go in-depth on Bloomberg Games. Get behind-the-scenes in…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
📩 Go in-depth on Bloomberg Games.

Get behind-the-scenes insights into Pointed and Alphadots, learn how they're built, and pick up strategies to improve your play. Sign up for the Bonus Points newsletter:
item.content:encoded:
📩 Go in-depth on Bloomberg Games.

Get behind-the-scenes insights into Pointed and Alphadots, learn how they're built, and pick up strategies to improve your play. Sign up for the Bonus Points newsletter:

item.title: 【今日のこよみ】 2026年7月9日(木) 旧暦5月25日 大安 甲申（きのえ さる） 十二直 のぞく 潮回り 長潮 …
item.author: ウェザーニュース (@weathernews.jp)
item.description:
【今日のこよみ】
2026年7月9日(木)
旧暦5月25日　大安
甲申（きのえ さる）
十二直 のぞく

潮回り 長潮
正午月齢 24.0
正午月相 22.3
https://weathernews.jp/news/202607/080011/
item.content:encoded:
【今日のこよみ】
2026年7月9日(木)
旧暦5月25日　大安
甲申（きのえ さる）
十二直 のぞく

潮回り 長潮
正午月齢 24.0
正午月相 22.3
https://weathernews.jp/news/202607/080011/

item.title: HBO Max received 122 Emmy nominations, Netflix landed 111, D…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
HBO Max received 122 Emmy nominations, Netflix landed 111, Disney received 111 overall, Apple scored 87, its most-ever, and Amazon landed 39 for Prime and MGM+ (Peter White/Deadline)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
HBO Max received 122 Emmy nominations, Netflix landed 111, Disney received 111 overall, Apple scored 87, its most-ever, and Amazon landed 39 for Prime and MGM+ (Peter White/Deadline)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: #🔖世の中 「これまでウソを放送してきた」国営テレビが謝罪 ニュース放送を一時停止し“黒い画面”を放送 ハンガリー｜F…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
「これまでウソを放送してきた」国営テレビが謝罪　ニュース放送を一時停止し“黒い画面”を放送　ハンガリー｜FNNプライムオンライン

ハンガリーの国営テレビは7日、「これまでウソを放送してきた」として謝罪してニュース放送を一時停止し、黒い画面が放送されました。 国営テレビのこちらの黒い画面には「公共のメディアはウソをつかない。長年このような状態を続けてしまったことをお詫びします」という文字が描かれています。 そのうえで「将来的に独...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
「これまでウソを放送してきた」国営テレビが謝罪　ニュース放送を一時停止し“黒い画面”を放送　ハンガリー｜FNNプライムオンライン

ハンガリーの国営テレビは7日、「これまでウソを放送してきた」として謝罪してニュース放送を一時停止し、黒い画面が放送されました。 国営テレビのこちらの黒い画面には「公共のメディアはウソをつかない。長年このような状態を続けてしまったことをお詫びします」という文字が描かれています。 そのうえで「将来的に独...

item.content:encoded: Thames Water creditors prepare fresh funding backing, Sky News reports reut.rs/3T52Wzx

item.title: Despite trade tensions, many of the air conditioners being s…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Despite trade tensions, many of the air conditioners being snapped up by sweaty European customers are made in China, which accounts for about 40% of global exports. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer reports.
item.content:encoded: Despite trade tensions, many of the air conditioners being snapped up by sweaty European customers are made in China, which accounts for about 40% of global exports. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer reports.

item.title: Pioneering gene-editing treatments are already in clinical u…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Pioneering gene-editing treatments are already in clinical use, saving lives and easing the pain of devastating genetic diseases. However, the growing number of patients receiving these treatments still run the risk of passing their disease-causing mutations to their children. https://cnn.it/4h0a0az
item.content:encoded: Pioneering gene-editing treatments are already in clinical use, saving lives and easing the pain of devastating genetic diseases. However, the growing number of patients receiving these treatments still run the risk of passing their disease-causing mutations to their children. https://cnn.it/4h0a0az

item.title: President Donald Trump asked a judge to withhold the $5 mill…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump asked a judge to withhold the $5 million plus interest he owes New York writer E. Jean Carroll, arguing the US Supreme Court hasn’t decided whether to reconsider his appeal in a sexual-abuse lawsuit.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump asked a judge to withhold the $5 million plus interest he owes New York writer E. Jean Carroll, arguing the US Supreme Court hasn’t decided whether to reconsider his appeal in a sexual-abuse lawsuit.

item.title: Former Florida gubernatorial candidate Andrew Gillum is arre…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Former Florida gubernatorial candidate Andrew Gillum is arrested on drug possession charges in Alabama after police say they pulled him over for erratic driving and found marijuana and meth in his vehicle.
item.content:encoded: Former Florida gubernatorial candidate Andrew Gillum is arrested on drug possession charges in Alabama after police say they pulled him over for erratic driving and found marijuana and meth in his vehicle.

item.title: Egypt was always the underdog against Argentina in the World…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Egypt was always the underdog against Argentina in the World Cup. But fans dared to hope after an early goal in a drama-filled match that fueled conspiracy theories and allegations of biased refereeing.
item.content:encoded: Egypt was always the underdog against Argentina in the World Cup. But fans dared to hope after an early goal in a drama-filled match that fueled conspiracy theories and allegations of biased refereeing.

item.title: Breaking News: A federal judge ordered that E. Jean Carroll …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: A federal judge ordered that E. Jean Carroll should be paid $5 million after a jury found President Trump liable for sexual abuse and defamation.
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: A federal judge ordered that E. Jean Carroll should be paid $5 million after a jury found President Trump liable for sexual abuse and defamation.

item.title: After sustained hot weather in Europe, sea temperatures arou…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: After sustained hot weather in Europe, sea temperatures around Britain are forecast to reach extreme levels this week, the country’s weather service said, threatening to disrupt and damage sea life.
item.content:encoded: After sustained hot weather in Europe, sea temperatures around Britain are forecast to reach extreme levels this week, the country’s weather service said, threatening to disrupt and damage sea life.

item.title: A federal appeals court for a second time said it would not …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: A federal appeals court for a second time said it would not quickly intervene to reverse a judge’s order that removed President Donald Trump’s name from the Kennedy Center. https://cnn.it/4viBg7E
item.content:encoded: A federal appeals court for a second time said it would not quickly intervene to reverse a judge’s order that removed President Donald Trump’s name from the Kennedy Center. https://cnn.it/4viBg7E

item.title: SpaceXAI has unveiled a new AI model built in partnership wi…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: SpaceXAI has unveiled a new AI model built in partnership with Cursor that’s meant to be more adept at finance, legal and coding tasks, in a bid by Elon Musk’s firm to gain ground on rivals Anthropic and OpenAI
item.content:encoded: SpaceXAI has unveiled a new AI model built in partnership with Cursor that’s meant to be more adept at finance, legal and coding tasks, in a bid by Elon Musk’s firm to gain ground on rivals Anthropic and OpenAI

item.title: What do you want to know about the World Cup? Reuters report…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description:
What do you want to know about the World Cup?
Reuters reporters are covering the matches, fans, politics, business and stories beyond the pitch. Send us your question, and it could be answered on Pitchside: reut.rs/4oXc7y0

Watch last week's episode here: reut.rs/4wijWR9
item.content:encoded:
What do you want to know about the World Cup?
Reuters reporters are covering the matches, fans, politics, business and stories beyond the pitch. Send us your question, and it could be answered on Pitchside: reut.rs/4oXc7y0

Watch last week's episode here: reut.rs/4wijWR9

item.title: President Donald Trump said the US would remove Syria from t…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump said the US would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list as he met with the country’s president, Ahmed al-Sharaa, on the sidelines of the NATO summit.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump said the US would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list as he met with the country’s president, Ahmed al-Sharaa, on the sidelines of the NATO summit.

item.title: The Egyptian Football Association criticized refereeing deci…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: The Egyptian Football Association criticized refereeing decisions in Egypt’s dramatic 3-2 World Cup round-of-16 defeat by Argentina, saying it would not remain silent over what it described as the improper use of the VAR system.
item.content:encoded: The Egyptian Football Association criticized refereeing decisions in Egypt’s dramatic 3-2 World Cup round-of-16 defeat by Argentina, saying it would not remain silent over what it described as the improper use of the VAR system.

item.title: If Graham Platner withdraws from the Senate race in Maine, t…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: If Graham Platner withdraws from the Senate race in Maine, the task of finding a new Democratic nominee will fall in part to Charles Dingman, the chair of the state's Democratic Party. Here's what to know about him.
item.content:encoded: If Graham Platner withdraws from the Senate race in Maine, the task of finding a new Democratic nominee will fall in part to Charles Dingman, the chair of the state's Democratic Party. Here's what to know about him.

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: Hannah Dugan, a former Wisconsin judge convicted of obstruct…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Hannah Dugan, a former Wisconsin judge convicted of obstructing immigration agents, was fined $5,000 but avoided prison. Dugan drew the ire of the Trump administration when she was accused of helping an undocumented immigrant evade federal agents.
item.content:encoded: Hannah Dugan, a former Wisconsin judge convicted of obstructing immigration agents, was fined $5,000 but avoided prison. Dugan drew the ire of the Trump administration when she was accused of helping an undocumented immigrant evade federal agents.

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 ハンガリー国営メディアが放送を一時停止 オルバン前政権時代のプロパガンダ一掃のため - BBCニュース…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)

ハンガリー国営メディアが放送を一時停止　オルバン前政権時代のプロパガンダ一掃のため - BBCニュース

画像説明, ハンガリーでは7日、国営テレビのチャンネルで、「長い間」うそをついていたことを謝罪するメッセージが映し出された

item.title: The day after a court decided the far-right leader Marine Le…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The day after a court decided the far-right leader Marine Le Pen could run for office again, cheers and boos met her campaign kickoff in La Flèche, France.
item.content:encoded: The day after a court decided the far-right leader Marine Le Pen could run for office again, cheers and boos met her campaign kickoff in La Flèche, France.
